hook: The ability to stay steady around attraction is part of confidence, not a bonus feature after it.
body: If your internal state collapses every time you care, your outside behavior will keep becoming harder to trust.

hook: Many men focus on what to say while ignoring what their physiology is doing to the whole interaction.
body: Confidence is partly nervous-system capacity, not just social strategy.

hook: Confidence is partly nervous-system capacity, not just social strategy.
body: Breathing slower, speaking slower, and waiting a beat can change the whole feel of an interaction without changing the words.

body: Build one calming habit you can use before dates, after dates, and during uncertain texting gaps.
